meaning: n.棍棒挥出前的准备姿态,回复(立场等)
examples: You have now completed the backswing.
Emphasize the backswing with your arms and stay smooth and symmetrical.
To better illustrate all this, Hogan put me in his address position and then in his position at the top of his backswing.
Uihlein takes a short, three-quarters backswing, and brings his club through the ball on a relatively shallow plane.
Try spending long seconds coiled at or near the top of your backswing and see what I mean.
